restrictions: Inspected only the assigned target assets and minimal supporting guidance files
Did not run build or lint because the parent validator owns shared heavy checks
Created only the assigned flow report and evidence note

findings.summary: No coordinate/path/gradient/filter position values above 2 decimal places were found in the 5 targeted assets.
Remaining 3+ decimal numbers were limited to feColorMatrix coefficients and a Framer Motion restDelta config value, both explicitly excluded by the milestone guidance.

assertions.title: SVGs have reduced coordinate precision
assertions.reason: All targeted coordinate/path/gradient/filter position values in the assigned assets are at most 2 decimal places. The only remaining 3+ decimal numbers are out-of-scope feColorMatrix coefficients and a Framer Motion restDelta value.

details: Automated regex inspection found no path d attributes or SVG position attributes with 3+ decimal places in the targeted files.

early-supporter-badge.svg line 9 uses filter position values x="5.34" y="5.42" width="10.66" height="9.91", and line 25 uses gradient positions x1="12.56" x2="6.25" y2="19.96"; all are within the <=2 decimal requirement.

The path data on early-supporter-badge.svg:3, early-supporter-badge.svg:5, premium-user-badge.svg:2, signature.tsx:21, verified.tsx:22, and signature-pad-dialog.tsx:91 contains only integers or decimals with at most 2 digits after the decimal point.

early-supporter-badge.svg:15 retains feColorMatrix coefficients 0.414307, 0.24341, and 0.0856598; per .factory/library/user-testing.md these non-coordinate coefficients do not count against VAL-RENDERING-002.
signature-pad-dialog.tsx:85 retains restDelta: 0.001; per .factory/library/user-testing.md motion config numbers do not count against VAL-RENDERING-002.
evidence.sharedChecks: Per .factory/library/user-testing.md, build and lint validation for this milestone are centralized in the parent validator and were not rerun in this flow validation.

summary: Re-ran VAL-RENDERING-002 against the current repo state after fix-svg-precision-remaining. The assertion now passes because all targeted coordinate/path/gradient/filter position values are at most 2 decimal places, with only explicitly ignored non-coordinate precision remaining.
